h2: What do you think of local NHS services?
text_excerpt: Surveys - Yvette Cooper MP - Yvette Cooper MP Skip to main content Yvette Cooper MP Labour MP for Pontefract, Castleford, Knottingley & Altofts and Foreign Secretary Join Get Involved Donate About Yvette Contact Latest News Surveys Your views More Menu Surveys Yvette’s primary role as your MP is to represent the views of local residents. To do this, she regularly runs surveys on key local concerns — such as experiences of crime across the Five Towns, waiting times at Pontefract and Pinderfields Hospitals, and community campaigns like holding Yorkshire Water accountable for the sewage discharged into the River Aire. Fill out one of the surveys below. If there is not a survey on an issue you would like to raise with Yvette, please do not hesitate to message Yvette directly here . Let me know what matters to you See more Water Survey Surveys Family Survey Surveys Bus Survey Surveys Defending Britain – Defence Spending Surveys Yvette’s Local Crime Survey Surveys What do you think of local NHS services?
